subject: Re: The dautoalign4warp didn't generate the xf file
body:
Hi Huabin,

Thanks for reaching out and sorry you ran into trouble! Log looks okay, your tilt-series have been aligned, the script only outputs the files necessary for tomogram reconstruction in Warp. 

I’m not sure what you commented out exactly but your files indicate that none of the metadata wrangling to get things ready for warp has been done. If you’re getting the -UnbinnedPixelSize error I think the path of least resistance will be to install the current beta version of IMOD https://bio3d.colorado.edu/ftp/latestIMOD/ <https://bio3d.colorado.edu/ftp/latestIMOD/> and rerun!

Don’t hesitate if you have any more questions, good luck!

Alister

> On 4 Aug 2021, at 03:34, Huabin Zhou <hbzhou.us@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> Hi  Alister,
> 
> I am also trying to go through the tutorial  https://teamtomo.org/walkthrough/EMPIAR-10164/ <https://teamtomo.org/walkthrough/EMPIAR-10164/>
> 
> When I try to align the tilt series with dautoalign, first I got the "-UnbinnedPixelSize" error. Then I comment it out in the script. Now everything looks fine but it just don't generate the stack file. I didn't  see any critical errors in the log, could you please take a look. 
> 
> Thank you so much for any comments!
> 
> Best,
> 
> Huabin
> 
> 
> --
